---
title: "fit_affine"
generated: true
description: "Closed-form (weighted) least-squares affine between point sets."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.geometry.affine`](../nitrix-geometry-affine.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:fit_affine -->
```python
fit_affine(source: Float[Array, '... m n'], target: Float[Array, '... m n'], weights: Optional[Float[Array, '... m']] = None) -> Float[Array, '... n np1']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:fit_affine -->
Closed-form (weighted) least-squares affine between point sets.

Fits an affine `mat` in `(..., N, N+1)` form so that `mat` maps
`target` onto `source`, i.e.
$\mathtt{source} \approx \mathtt{mat}[\ldots, :, :-1]\,
\mathtt{target} + \mathtt{mat}[\ldots, :, -1]$, minimising the
(weighted) squared residual over the `M` corresponding points.

The fit solves the normal equations
$(X^{\top} W X)\,\beta = X^{\top} W y$ (with $X$ the
homogeneous `target`, $y$ the `source`, and $W$ the
diagonal weight matrix) via a symmetric-positive-definite Cholesky
solve.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:fit_affine -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `source` | `Float` | `...` × `m` × `n` | — | Batched target coordinates of the fit: `M` points in `N` dimensions that the affine should map onto. |
| `target` | `Float` | `...` × `m` × `n` | — | Batched source coordinates of the fit: the `M` points in `N` dimensions that are mapped by the affine. |
| `weights` | `Optional[Float[Array, '... m']]` | — | `None` | Per-point non-negative weights, `(..., M)` or `(..., M, 1)`. If omitted, all points are weighted equally. |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `...` × `n` × `np1`. The fitted affine in `(..., N, N+1)` form.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:fit_affine -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `m` | rows of a multi-row contrast |
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `np1` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
